advisory.title: ASA-2024-007: Potential Reentrancy using Timeout Callbacks in ibc-hooks
advisory.description: ibc-go advisory ASA-2024-007 covers a reentrancy condition in the IBC core timeout message handler. A malicious CosmWasm contract can recursively invoke MsgTimeout from within its OnTimeout callback before the original packet commitment is deleted, which on ibc-hooks-wrapped ICS-20 chains can result in unauthorized token minting or fund loss from escrow accounts. The fix in v4.6.0, v5.4.0, v6.3.0, v7.4.0, and v8.2.0 deletes the packet commitment before invoking the application callback in modules/core/keeper/msg_server.go.

timeline.notes: vulnerableHead is the v8.1.1 release commit, the last vulnerable v8.x release before the v8.2.0 patch. The v8.1.1..v8.2.0 commit 5e2e9ebc2 (Merge pull request from GHSA-j496-crgh-34mx) modifies modules/core/keeper/msg_server.go to delete the packet commitment before invoking application callbacks, breaking the reentrancy window. The vulnerable ordering (cbs.OnTimeoutPacket invoked before k.ChannelKeeper.TimeoutExecuted) entered the repository in initial setup commit 09646a01 and later moved under modules/core/keeper/msg_server.go. This is a feature-inception introducer: the baseline is the parent of the first implementation commit, the parent lacks the affected timeout handler ordering, and the patch reverses that exact ordering. Under the corpus confidence criteria, that is high-confidence timeline evidence even though the bug was not introduced by a later regression.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should flag the ordering bug in modules/core/keeper/msg_server.go where the IBC timeout handler invokes the application OnTimeout callback before deleting the packet commitment, allowing a malicious contract to recursively replay MsgTimeout and double-spend escrowed funds.

checks.name: advisory_published
checks.details: ASA-2024-007 (GHSA-j496-crgh-34mx) was published on 2024-04-05 with patches in ibc-go v4.6.0, v5.4.0, v6.3.0, v7.4.0, and v8.2.0.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_in_advisory_range
checks.details: vulnerableHead is the v8.1.1 release commit, the latest tag in the <8.2.0 vulnerable range for v8.x.

checks.name: introducing_commit_contains_vulnerable_pattern
checks.details: git show 09646a01 adds Timeout and TimeoutOnClose handlers that invoke cbs.OnTimeoutPacket before TimeoutExecuted deletes the packet commitment; that ordering is later carried into modules/core/keeper/msg_server.go.
